segments.text: Not to us, Lord, not to us but to your name be the glory, because of your love and faithfulness.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Why do the nations say,
Where is their God?
segments.speaker: Nations

segments.text: Our God is in heaven; he does whatever pleases him.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: But their idols are silver and gold, made by human hands.
They have mouths, but cannot speak, eyes, but cannot see.
They have ears, but cannot hear, noses, but cannot smell.
They have hands, but cannot feel, feet, but cannot walk, nor can they utter a sound with their throats.
Those who make them will be like them, and so will all who trust in them.
All you Israelites, trust in the Lord— he is their help and shield.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: House of Aaron, trust in the Lord— he is their help and shield.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You who fear him, trust in the Lord— he is their help and shield.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The Lord remembers us and will bless us:
He will bless his people Israel, he will bless the house of Aaron,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: he will bless those who fear the Lord— small and great alike.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: May the Lord cause you to flourish, both you and your children.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May you be blessed by the Lord, the Maker of heaven and earth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The highest heavens belong to the Lord, but the earth he has given to mankind.
It is not the dead who praise the Lord, those who go down to the place of silence;
it is we who extol the Lord, both now and forevermore. Praise the Lord.
segments.speaker: David
